steps.title: Interpret the function notation
steps.content:
In $h(x) = -16x^2 + 20x + 5$, the input $x$ is time in seconds and the output $h(x)$ is height in feet.
So $h(1.4) = 1.64$ means: at $x = 1.4$ seconds, the height equals $1.64$ feet.

steps.title: Evaluate each choice
steps.content:
• Choice A: Height at $1.4$ seconds is $1.64$ feet — matches the input/output interpretation.
  • Choice B: Swaps the input and output (time $1.64$, height $1.4$). Eliminate.
  • Choice C: Talks about a ratio to initial height; the equation gives an absolute height, not a multiplicative comparison. Eliminate.
  • Choice D: Refers to speed, but $h(x)$ models height, not speed. Eliminate.
That matches choice A — A is correct.
